glosses.zh-Hans: 在某人家; 在某人那里
glosses.yue: 喺某人屋企; 喺某人嗰度
glosses.pt: em casa de; na casa de
glosses.vi: ở nhà ai; ở chỗ ai
glosses.id: di rumah seseorang; di tempat seseorang

sentences.target: On se retrouve chez toi ce soir.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ sə ʁətʁuv ʃe twa sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: On se retrouve chez toi ce soir.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ sə ʁətʁuv ʃe twa sə swaʁ/
translations.en: We meet at your place tonight.
translations.es: Nos vemos en tu casa esta noche.
translations.de: Wir treffen uns heute Abend bei dir.
translations.it: Ci vediamo a casa tua stasera.
translations.yue: 我哋今晚喺你屋企見面。
translations.ru: Встречаемся сегодня вечером у тебя дома.
translations.pt: Nos encontramos na sua casa hoje à noite.
translations.vi: Tối nay chúng ta gặp nhau ở nhà bạn.
translations.nl: We spreken vanavond bij jou af.
translations.uk: Зустрінемось сьогодні ввечері у тебе вдома.
translations.hi: आज रात हम तुम्हारे घर मिलेंगे.
translations.pl: Spotykamy się dziś wieczorem u ciebie.
translations.nb: Vi møtes hos deg i kveld.
translations.id: Kita bertemu di rumahmu malam ini.
translations.sv: Vi ses hos dig i kväll.
translations.cs: Sejdeme se dnes večer u tebe.
translations.da: Vi mødes hos dig i aften.
translations.ja: 今夜、あなたの家で会います。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (generic/we) governing a 3rd-person singular verb.
Clitic reflexive/reciprocal pronoun forming the pronominal verb se retrouver (‘to meet up’).
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular, in pronominal construction with se.
Preposition introducing the locative complement ‘chez toi’.
Stressed 2nd-person singular pronoun, object of the preposition chez (‘at your place’).
Demonstrative determiner modifying ‘soir’ in the time expression ‘ce soir’.
Temporal noun forming an adverbial time complement (‘this evening’).

sentences.target: Je passe chez le médecin demain matin.
sentences.reading: /ʒə pas ʃe lə medsɛ̃ dəmɛ̃ matɛ̃/

translations.fr: Je passe chez le médecin demain matin.
translations.ipa: /ʒə pas ʃe lə medsɛ̃ dəmɛ̃ matɛ̃/
translations.en: I’m stopping by the doctor’s tomorrow morning.
translations.es: Mañana por la mañana paso por el médico.
translations.de: Ich gehe morgen früh kurz zum Arzt.
translations.ko: 내일 아침에 병원에 잠깐 들를 거예요.
translations.zh-Hans: 明天早上我去医生那儿一趟。
translations.yue: 聽朝朝早我去睇醫生一轉。
translations.ru: Завтра утром я загляну к врачу.
translations.pt: Amanhã de manhã vou passar no médico.
translations.vi: Sáng mai tôi ghé bác sĩ.
translations.nl: Ik ga morgenochtend even langs bij de dokter.
translations.uk: Завтра вранці я зайду до лікаря.
translations.hi: कल सुबह मैं डॉक्टर के पास होकर आऊँगा.
translations.el: Αύριο το πρωί θα περάσω από τον γιατρό.
translations.nb: I morgen tidlig tar jeg en tur innom legen.
translations.id: Besok pagi saya mampir ke dokter.
translations.sv: Imorgon bitti svänger jag förbi läkaren.
translations.ro: Mâine dimineață trec pe la doctor.
translations.cs: Zítra ráno se zastavím u doktora.
translations.da: I morgen tidlig kigger jeg forbi lægen.
translations.ja: 明日の朝、医者にちょっと寄ります。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular; intransitive here with a prepositional complement.
Preposition introducing the destination ‘chez le médecin’.
Definite article, masculine singular, determiner of ‘médecin’.
Common noun, head of the prepositional phrase ‘chez le médecin’ (place/person visited).
Temporal adverb specifying the day.
Temporal noun refining the time (‘demain matin’).

translations.en: They are eating at their neighbors’.
translations.es: Comen en casa de sus vecinos.
translations.it: Mangiano a casa dei loro vicini.
translations.ko: 그들은 이웃 집에서 밥을 먹고 있어요.
translations.pt: Eles estão comendo na casa dos vizinhos.
translations.vi: Họ đang ăn ở nhà hàng xóm.
translations.hi: वे अपने पड़ोसियों के यहाँ खाना खा रहे हैं.
translations.el: Τρώνε στο σπίτι των γειτόνων τους.
translations.id: Mereka sedang makan di rumah tetangga.
translations.ja: 彼らは近所の家で食事しています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 3rd person plural.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person plural.
Preposition introducing the locative complement.
Possessive determiner agreeing in number with ‘voisins’.
Plural noun, complement of ‘chez’, denoting whose place it is.

sentences.target: Tu peux le déposer chez moi.

translations.fr: Tu peux le déposer chez moi.
translations.en: You can drop it off at my place.
translations.de: Du kannst es bei mir abgeben.
translations.ko: 그걸 제 집에 두고 가도 돼요.
translations.yue: 你可以攞嚟我屋企放低。
translations.ru: Можешь оставить это у меня дома.
translations.pt: Você pode deixar isso na minha casa.
translations.he: אתה יכול להשאיר את זה אצלי.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể để nó ở nhà tôi.
translations.nl: Je kunt het bij mij thuis afgeven.
translations.uk: Можеш залишити це у мене вдома.
translations.hi: तुम इसे मेरे घर छोड़ सकते हो.
translations.el: Μπορείς να το αφήσεις στο σπίτι μου.
translations.nb: Du kan levere det hos meg.
translations.id: Kamu bisa antar itu ke rumahku.
translations.sv: Du kan lämna det hos mig.
translations.da: Du kan aflevere det hos mig.
translations.ja: それを私の家に置いていってもいいです。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative 2nd person singular, selecting the infinitive ‘déposer’.
3rd person masculine singular direct-object clitic placed before the infinitive.
Lexical verb in the infinitive, complement of the modal ‘peux’.
Preposition introducing the goal/location ‘chez moi’.
Stressed 1st-person singular pronoun, object of ‘chez’ (‘at my place’).
